name: last30days-pp-mcp
description: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and the web - last 30 days, scored by upvotes, likes, and real-money prediction-market odds.

openai_api_key.title: OPENAI_API_KEY
openai_api_key.description: OpenAI API key. Powers Reddit research via OpenAI's web_search tool. Get one at https://platform.openai.com/api-keys.

xai_api_key.title: XAI_API_KEY
xai_api_key.description: xAI API key. Powers X / Twitter research via xAI's x_search tool. Get one at https://console.x.ai/.

brave_api_key.title: BRAVE_API_KEY
brave_api_key.description: Brave Search API key. Used for grounded web search results. Get one at https://brave.com/search/api/.

exa_api_key.title: EXA_API_KEY
exa_api_key.description: Exa search API key. Alternative web search backend with semantic ranking. Get one at https://exa.ai/.

serper_api_key.title: SERPER_API_KEY
serper_api_key.description: Serper API key. Google search via API. Get one at https://serper.dev/.

google_api_key.title: GOOGLE_API_KEY
google_api_key.description: Google API key for YouTube transcript fetching and other Google services. Get one at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials.

gemini_api_key.title: GEMINI_API_KEY
gemini_api_key.description: Gemini API key. Used for synthesis fallback when other LLM providers are unavailable. Get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey.

google_genai_api_key.title: GOOGLE_GENAI_API_KEY
google_genai_api_key.description: Alternative Google generative-AI API key. Same source as GEMINI_API_KEY; set whichever name your tooling expects.

apify_api_token.title: APIFY_API_TOKEN
apify_api_token.description: Apify API token. Powers TikTok and Instagram Reels search via Apify actors. Get one at https://console.apify.com/account/integrations.

bsky_app_password.title: BSKY_APP_PASSWORD
bsky_app_password.description: Bluesky app password (not your main password). Powers AT Protocol post search. Create at https://bsky.app/settings/app-passwords.

parallel_api_key.title: PARALLEL_API_KEY
parallel_api_key.description: Parallel AI key. Powers parallel research runs across sources. Get one at https://parallel.ai/.

scrapecreators_api_key.title: SCRAPECREATORS_API_KEY
scrapecreators_api_key.description: ScrapeCreators API key. Powers creator-focused social search across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube. Get one at https://scrapecreators.com/.

openrouter_api_key.title: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
openrouter_api_key.description: OpenRouter API key. Alternative LLM provider gateway for synthesis. Get one at https://openrouter.ai/keys.
